Container.Name: duplicacy-exporter
Container.Overview: Prometheus exporter for Duplicacy backup metrics. Provides real-time progress, speed, and post-run summaries for Grafana dashboards. Supports Duplicacy CLI (via Docker log tailing or file monitoring) and Duplicacy Web UI (via webhook). [br][br] Tiny Alpine image (~30 MB). Three collection modes: log_tail (Docker socket), log_file (file path), or webhook (HTTP push). [br][br] More info: https://github.com/GeiserX/duplicacy-exporter
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: duplicacy prometheus grafana metrics backup monitoring exporter

Config.Name: Metrics Port
Config.Description: Prometheus metrics and webhook endpoint port

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Docker socket for log tailing mode (read-only)

Config.Name: Log Directory
Config.Description: Log file directory for log_file mode (read-only)

Config.Name: Mode
Config.Description: Collection mode: log_tail, log_file, or webhook

Config.Name: Container Name
Config.Description: Container name to tail logs from (log_tail mode)

Config.Name: Replay Hours
Config.Description: Hours of Docker log history to replay on startup
